sentences.target: Meine Nachbarin gießt heute die Blumen.

translations.de: Meine Nachbarin gießt heute die Blumen.
translations.en: My neighbor is watering the flowers today.
translations.es: Hoy mi vecina riega las flores.
translations.fr: Ma voisine arrose les fleurs aujourd'hui.
translations.it: La mia vicina annaffia i fiori oggi.
translations.ko: 오늘 이웃이 꽃에 물을 주고 있어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 今天我的女邻居在给花浇水。
translations.yue: 今日我嘅女鄰居喺度淋花。
translations.pt: Minha vizinha está regando as flores hoje.
translations.he: השכנה שלי משקה את הפרחים היום.
translations.vi: Hôm nay hàng xóm của tôi đang tưới hoa.
translations.nl: Mijn buurvrouw geeft vandaag de bloemen water.
translations.hu: A szomszédnőm ma locsolja a virágokat.
translations.hi: आज मेरी पड़ोसन फूलों को पानी दे रही है।
translations.el: Η γειτόνισσά μου ποτίζει σήμερα τα λουλούδια.
translations.nb: Naboen min vanner blomstene i dag.
translations.id: Hari ini tetangga saya menyiram bunga.
translations.sv: Min granne vattnar blommorna i dag.
translations.da: Min nabo vander blomsterne i dag.
translations.ja: 今日はうちの隣の人が花に水をやっている。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner modifying 'Nachbarin'; feminine nominative singular, marks ownership of the subject.
Common noun; feminine nominative singular; subject of the sentence.
Finite main verb, present tense, 3rd person singular; transitive, governs an accusative object.
Temporal adverb specifying the time of the action.
Definite article introducing 'Blumen'; plural accusative.
Plural common noun in accusative; direct object of 'gießt'.

sentences.target: Ich frage die Nachbarin nach dem Paket.
sentences.reading: /ɪç ˈfʁaːɡə diː ˈnaχbaːʁɪn naːx deːm paˈkeːt/

translations.de: Ich frage die Nachbarin nach dem Paket.
translations.ipa: /ɪç ˈfʁaːɡə diː ˈnaχbaːʁɪn naːx deːm paˈkeːt/
translations.en: I ask my neighbor about the package.
translations.es: Le pregunto a la vecina por el paquete.
translations.fr: Je demande à ma voisine au sujet du colis.
translations.it: Chiedo alla mia vicina del pacco.
translations.yue: 我問女鄰居個包裹嘅事。
translations.pt: Eu pergunto à vizinha sobre a encomenda.
translations.he: אני שואל את השכנה לגבי החבילה.
translations.vi: Tôi hỏi hàng xóm về gói hàng.
translations.nl: Ik vraag mijn buurvrouw naar het pakket.
translations.hi: मैं पड़ोसन से पार्सल के बारे में पूछता हूँ।
translations.el: Ρωτάω τη γειτόνισσά μου για το δέμα.
translations.nb: Jeg spør naboen min om pakken.
translations.id: Saya bertanya kepada tetangga tentang paket.
translations.sv: Jag frågar min granne om paketet.
translations.ja: 隣の人に荷物のことを聞く。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular nominative; subject.
Finite main verb, present tense, 1st person singular; takes an accusative object and a 'nach + DAT' prepositional complement.
Definite article for 'Nachbarin'; feminine accusative singular.
Common noun; feminine accusative singular; direct object of 'frage'.
Preposition governing dative; introduces a PP indicating the topic of inquiry.
Definite article; dative neuter singular with 'Paket'.
Common noun; neuter dative singular; object of the preposition 'nach'.

sentences.target: Unsere Nachbarin backt morgen einen Kuchen.

translations.de: Unsere Nachbarin backt morgen einen Kuchen.
translations.en: Our neighbor is baking a cake tomorrow.
translations.es: Mañana nuestra vecina hornea un pastel.
translations.fr: Notre voisine fait un gâteau demain.
translations.it: Domani la nostra vicina prepara una torta.
translations.ko: 우리 이웃이 내일 케이크를 구울 거예요.
translations.zh-Hans: 明天我们的女邻居要烤一个蛋糕。
translations.yue: 我哋嘅女鄰居聽日會焗個蛋糕。
translations.ru: Наша соседка завтра будет печь торт.
translations.pt: Nossa vizinha vai assar um bolo amanhã.
translations.vi: Ngày mai hàng xóm của chúng tôi sẽ nướng một cái bánh.
translations.nl: Onze buurvrouw bakt morgen een taart.
translations.hu: A szomszédnőnk holnap süt egy tortát.
translations.el: Η γειτόνισσά μας θα ψήσει ένα κέικ αύριο.
translations.nb: Naboen vår baker en kake i morgen.
translations.id: Besok tetangga kami akan memanggang kue.
translations.sv: Vår granne bakar en kaka i morgon.
translations.ro: Vecina noastră va coace o prăjitură mâine.
translations.da: Vores nabo bager en kage i morgen.
translations.ja: うちの隣の人は明日ケーキを焼く。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner modifying 'Nachbarin'; feminine nominative singular; indicates group ownership.
Common noun; feminine nominative singular; subject.

Common noun; masculine accusative singular; direct object of 'backt'.

sentences.target: Die Nachbarin hilft mir mit dem Fahrrad.
sentences.reading: /diː ˈnaχbaːʁɪn hɪlft miːɐ̯ mɪt deːm ˈfaːʁʁaːt/

translations.de: Die Nachbarin hilft mir mit dem Fahrrad.
translations.ipa: /diː ˈnaχbaːʁɪn hɪlft miːɐ̯ mɪt deːm ˈfaːʁʁaːt/
translations.en: The neighbor helps me with the bike.
translations.es: La vecina me ayuda con la bicicleta.
translations.fr: La voisine m'aide avec le vélo.
translations.it: La vicina mi aiuta con la bici.
translations.yue: 我嘅女鄰居幫我整單車。
translations.pt: A vizinha me ajuda com a bicicleta.
translations.tr: Komşu bana bisiklet konusunda yardım ediyor.
translations.vi: Hàng xóm giúp tôi với chiếc xe đạp.
translations.nl: De buurvrouw helpt me met de fiets.
translations.hu: A szomszédnő segít nekem a biciklivel.
translations.hi: पड़ोसन साइकिल के काम में मेरी मदद करती है।
translations.el: Η γειτόνισσα με βοηθάει με το ποδήλατο.
translations.ja: 隣の人が自転車のことで手伝ってくれる。

es: Hoy mi vecina riega las flores.

La vecina me ayuda con la bicicleta.

Je demande à ma voisine au sujet du colis.
Notre voisine fait un gâteau demain.
La voisine m'aide avec le vélo.
